metadata.description: Create a professional online portfolio in minutes. Pick a template, fill in your info, and your site is live at username.vizly.fr.

pricing.title: Simple,
pricing.subtitle: Start for free. You only pay when you want to publish your portfolio.

free.name: Free
free.description: To discover and create your portfolio.

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: To publish multiple portfolios without limits.

items.q: What is Vizly?
items.a: Vizly is an online portfolio builder. You fill in a guided form, pick a template, and your portfolio site is live at username.vizly.fr in minutes. No technical skills required.

items.q: How much does it cost?
items.a: Creating and previewing your portfolio is 100% free. Publishing starts at €4.99/month (Starter plan). The Pro plan at €9.99/month adds a custom domain, contact form, and analytics. Premium templates are €2.99 each (one-time purchase).

items.q: Can I change my plan at any time?
items.a: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan whenever you want from your dashboard. The change takes effect immediately, and billing is adjusted pro rata.

items.q: Is there a commitment?
items.a: The monthly plan has no commitment, you can cancel at any time from your dashboard. The yearly plan commits for twelve months in exchange for a fifteen percent discount.

items.q: Can I try before paying?
items.a: Yes, the Free plan lets you create your full portfolio and preview it, without any credit card required. You only pay if you decide to publish it online.

items.q: How does the right of withdrawal work?
items.a: For Starter and Pro subscriptions, you have the legal fourteen-day right of withdrawal after your first subscription, in accordance with French consumer law. For individual premium template purchases (€2.99), you agree to waive the right of withdrawal at the time of purchase, allowing you to use the template immediately — these purchases are final.

items.q: What payment methods do you accept?
items.a: Credit card (Visa, Mastercard, American Express), Apple Pay, Google Pay and PayPal. SEPA transfers and installment payments are not available.

items.q: What happens at the end of my yearly subscription if I don't renew?
items.a: Your portfolio remains accessible for thirty days after your subscription ends, giving you time to react. After that, it switches to draft mode and is no longer publicly visible, but all your data is preserved. You can renew at any time to put it back online.

items.q: Can the "Made with Vizly" badge be removed?
items.a: Yes, by upgrading to the Pro plan. The badge is present on the Starter plan and remains visible at the bottom of your published portfolio. The Pro plan completely removes the badge.

items.q: What happens if I downgrade from Pro to Starter while I have multiple published portfolios?
items.a: You keep access to all your portfolios but only one remains published online (your choice). The others switch to draft and you can republish them at any time by upgrading back to Pro.

items.q: Can I use my own domain name?
items.a: Yes, with the Pro plan (€9.99/month). You buy your domain from the registrar of your choice and point your DNS to Vizly. We provide a step-by-step guide.

items.q: What happens if I stop paying?
items.a: Your portfolio goes offline within 24 hours. You'll receive a warning email. All your data is kept for 30 days. If you reactivate during that period, everything comes back online instantly.

items.q: Is my data secure?
items.a: Yes. Your data is stored on Supabase (EU servers). Payments are processed by Stripe (no credit card stored on our end). We only use functional cookies. You can delete your account and data at any time.

items.q: How many projects can I add?
items.a: As many as you want. There's no limit on the number of projects, regardless of your plan.

items.q: Can I change templates after publishing?
items.a: Yes, you can switch templates at any time from the editor. Your data is preserved, only the design changes.

items.q: Are premium templates a subscription?
items.a: No, it's a one-time purchase at €2.99. You buy a template once and keep it forever.

items.q: How do I delete my account?
items.a: Go to Settings > Delete my account. All your data will be permanently deleted.

items.q: How do I contact support?
items.a: Send an email to tom@vizly.fr. We usually respond within 24 hours.

items.q: Is Vizly mobile-friendly?
items.a: Yes, all templates are responsive and mobile-first. Your portfolio looks great on phone, tablet, and desktop.

items.q: Can I export my portfolio?
items.a: For now, portfolios are hosted exclusively on Vizly. Export is planned for a future update.

comparison.title: What changes
comparison.intro: All creation features — templates, customization, KPIs, auto-save, custom blocks — are included in every plan, free included. Here's what differs.

welcome.preheader: Create your first portfolio in minutes — pick a template, fill in your details, publish on your subdomain.
welcome.heading: Your account is ready
welcome.body1: Glad to have you here. You can now create your first portfolio in just a few minutes.
welcome.body2: Pick a template, fill in your details, publish.

portfolioPublished.preheader: Here's the public URL for your portfolio. You can share it right now.
portfolioPublished.heading: Your portfolio is live
portfolioPublished.body: It's live. Your portfolio is now publicly available at this address:

share.linkedinText: Just published my portfolio. It showcases my work and background — feel free to take a look and share any feedback.

paymentSucceeded.preheader: Here are your subscription details and a link to manage it anytime.
paymentSucceeded.heading: Payment received
paymentSucceeded.body: Thanks for your payment. Your {planName} subscription is active.
paymentSucceeded.outro: If you have any questions, just reply to this email.

planChanged.preheaderUpgrade: Here are your updated subscription details and the next renewal date.
planChanged.preheaderDowngrade: Here's when the change takes effect and your new subscription details.
planChanged.heading: Plan updated
planChanged.bodyUpgrade: Your subscription is moving to {newPlan} starting today.
planChanged.bodyDowngrade: Your subscription will move back to {newPlan} at the end of your current period.
planChanged.outroUpgrade: Pro features are already active on your account.
planChanged.outroDowngrade: You keep your Pro features until {date}. You can switch back to Pro anytime from your account.
planChanged.footerNote: If you have any questions, just reply to this email.

renewalReminder.preheader: Automatic renewal on {date}. You can update your subscription before then if needed.
renewalReminder.heading: Your subscription is about to renew
renewalReminder.body: Your Vizly {planName} annual subscription will be renewed on {date} for {amount}.
renewalReminder.noActionHeading: You don't need to do anything
renewalReminder.noActionBody: If everything looks good, your subscription will continue automatically on the renewal date.
renewalReminder.modifyHeading: If you'd like to make changes
renewalReminder.modifyBody: You can update or cancel your subscription anytime before {date} from your account.
renewalReminder.footerNote: If you have any questions, just reply to this email.

subscriptionCancelled.preheader: Your portfolios, projects and purchased templates stay in your workspace. Here's when and what changes.
subscriptionCancelled.heading: Your subscription is ending
subscriptionCancelled.body: Your Vizly {previousPlan} subscription ends on {date}. From that date, you'll move to the Free plan.
subscriptionCancelled.whatStaysBody: Nothing is deleted. Your portfolios, projects, images, and purchased templates remain in your workspace. You can restart your subscription anytime to republish them.
subscriptionCancelled.whatChangesBody: Starting {date}, all your published portfolios will be unpublished. They will no longer be accessible from their public URL.
subscriptionCancelled.footerNote: If you have any questions, just reply to this email.

paymentFailed.preheader: Your subscription stays active. Here are the details and next steps.
paymentFailed.heading: Payment failed
paymentFailed.body: We weren't able to charge your payment method for your Vizly {planName} subscription. Your subscription stays active and your portfolios stay online.
paymentFailed.nextSteps: We'll automatically retry the payment over the next few days. If no payment goes through by {date}, your subscription will move back to the Free plan.
paymentFailed.footerNote: If you have any questions, just reply to this email.

billingPeriodChanged.preheaderToYearly: Here are your new billing details and the next renewal date.
billingPeriodChanged.preheaderToMonthly: Here's when the change takes effect and your new billing details.
billingPeriodChanged.heading: Billing cycle updated
billingPeriodChanged.bodyToYearly: You're switching to annual billing starting today.
billingPeriodChanged.bodyToMonthly: You're switching back to monthly billing at the end of your current period.
billingPeriodChanged.outroToYearly: Your plan stays the same — only the billing cycle is changing.
billingPeriodChanged.outroToMonthly: Your annual billing runs until {date}. After that, you'll be charged {amount} per month.
billingPeriodChanged.footerNote: If you have any questions, just reply to this email.
